red_test.reason: Final aggregation consumes existing readbacks and does not mutate downstream repositories.

targeted_test.command: aggregate 39 prior promoter_no_promotion.json and command_readback.json files
targeted_test.output: 39 prior Promoter readbacks are no_promotion_requested with zero promotion_claimed; 39 prior Command readbacks agree no promotion and keep RSI denied.

integration_test.command: go test ./... -count=1 && go vet ./... && go build -o target/atlas-node40-verification ./cmd/atlas
integration_test.output: Atlas full verification passed; generated verification artifact was removed.

status_test.command: validate final no-promotion and Command rollup inputs
status_test.output: All prior aggregate inputs agree no promotion, claims_authority_advance=false, and rsi_remains_denied=true.

next_test.command: final wave readback, evidence validation, and public-safety scan after complete-node
next_test.output: Final node completed with 40 nodes, zero ready/blocked/failed nodes, terminal Command agreement, final public-safety binding, and final_response_allowed=true.

objective: Produce the final AO Promoter/Command no-promotion and RSI-denial rollup for the complete Month 2 contract-convergence wave through a bounded Atlas evidence node.
